about_home.title: About Clean Mountain & CO
about_home.intro: At the heart of the Alps, CLEAN MOUNTAIN & CO supports you with tailored services in Châtel, La Chapelle-d'Abondance and Abondance.
about_home.personal: As a self-employed professional, I offer you a personalized, reliable and responsive service, with real attention to detail, to provide a unique and memorable experience for your guests or clients.
about_home.v1_text: Professional service and attention to detail
about_home.v2_text: Products and methods that respect the environment

page.title: Our Services

page.gift_desc: Delicate attentions for your guests or yourself.

about.intro_text: Clean Mountain was born from a passion for the Alps and a desire to offer superior quality cleaning services adapted to the unique requirements of mountain life.
about.history_p1: Clean Mountain &Co aims to be a benchmark for professional cleaning in Châtel and its surroundings, combining efficiency, comfort, and respect for the environment.
about.history_p2: We offer a tailor-made package including premises maintenance, home-cooked meals, and gourmet gift sets, subtly marrying Savoyard tradition and exotic flavors. Aware of the mountain's purity, we use only ecological equipment, respectful of health and the environment in which we live.
about.zone_text: We primarily serve the following municipalities:
about.zone_p2: Our deep knowledge of the terrain and local weather conditions allows us to adapt our services to the specificities of each season. Whether in winter with snow or in summer with trail dust, we are equipped to meet all your needs.
about.v1_title: Irreproachable Quality – Rigor and attention to the smallest details, nothing is left to chance.
about.v2_title: Environmental Respect – Methods and products that respect alpine nature.
about.v3_title: Trust and Professionalism – Reliability and discretion for your peace of mind.

eco.subtitle: Clean Mountain is committed to cleaning that respects the alpine environment.
eco.benefits_title: Benefits for our Clients and Nature
eco.benefits_p1: With Clean Mountain, enjoy healthy spaces and a preserved quality of life, while protecting the alpine ecosystems of Châtel and its surroundings.
eco.benefits_p2: Your trust contributes directly to the preservation of local biodiversity and the purity of our mountain environment for a sustainable future.

menu.hero_description: "The maquis" is the soul of Ivorian cuisine: a lively, warm, and authentic place where generous dishes are shared in a friendly atmosphere. At Ange's Maquis, the spirit of the maquis rises up and invites itself into the mountains.
menu.title: Exotic Menus
menu.subtitle: Fresh ingredients, refined and tasty recipes
menu.starter_desc: A light and fragrant mix, ideal for awakening the taste buds
menu.p1_desc: Refined alliance of vegetables and exotic fragrances
menu.p3_name: Melting eggplant stew with beef or free-range chicken
menu.p4_name: Country Mafé "peanut sauce" with beef or free-range chicken
menu.p5_name: Exotic Ivorian grills and their rougaille
menu.p5_desc: Festival of flavors and barbecue indulgence
sides: Fragrant pilaf rice or delicate coconut rice
menu.ps_veggie: All our dishes can be adapted for vegetarians
menu.ps_spices: Mild spices, spicy version available on request.
menu.order_desc: Finalize your order. We will contact you quickly to confirm details.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Your satisfaction is our greatest reward. Discover the reviews of those who trust us in Châtel.

reviews.r1_text: Impeccable service! My chalet has never been so clean. The attention to detail is impressive.
reviews.r2_text: The Ange's Maquis menu was an incredible discovery. A real culinary journey delivered right to our door.
reviews.r3_text: Top professionalism and responsiveness for managing my Airbnb rental. I highly recommend!

r4.title: Home Cooking
r4.desc: Clean Mountain & Co brings exotic family cuisine directly to your home. Homemade, flavorful dishes prepared with fresh products for shared convivial meals.
r4.quote1: "Authentic and surprising: discover the marriage of artisan Savoyard and exotic delights."
r4.quote2: "Traditional dishes, rich sauces and a convivial atmosphere: a true gastronomic journey."

r5.title: Gourmet Gift Sets
r5.desc: Savoyard traditions and delicacies prepared to order.

r6.title: Home Staging
r6.desc: Home staging enhances your home. Clean Mountain & Co combines professional cleaning, careful layout, and interior decoration designed to charm and seduce every visitor.

r7.title: Linen management & Bed setup
r7.desc: Special attention to comfort: full home linen management and careful bed setup for professional hosting.
